parameters.content:
## Weather Forecast Locations
Weather Forecast locations are currently reduced to
- DWD Germany
- NOAA U.S.
- Météo-France
- ECMWF
- UK Met Office
- KMA Korea
- JMA Japan
- MeteoSwiss
- MET Norway
- GEM Canada
- BOM Australia
- CMA China
- KNMI Netherlands
- DMI Denmark
- ItaliaMeteo
- GeoSphere Austria

due to API reasons

The API that runs behind the chatbot.

_Next: Fix ChatGPT not working_

options.systemMessage:
=You are a helpful AI assistant with access to weather and news tools.
Use tools when necessary and answer conversationally.

Current date and time: {{ $now }}

You must assume this is the current real-world date and use it when answering questions about weather, forecasts, schedules or time-sensitive information.

parameters.toolDescription: Get weather forecast anywhere, anytime. You can make requests by assuming most information, the only thing you need is the location (use the city name to infer lat and long automatically) and time period (assume today if not specified)

parameters.name: latitude
parameters.value: ={{ /*n8n-auto-generated-fromAI-override*/ $fromAI('parameters0_Value', `Latitude of the location, e.g. 45.75 for Lyon. Do not ask the user just infer it automatically.`, 'string') }}

parameters.name: longitude
parameters.value: ={{ /*n8n-auto-generated-fromAI-override*/ $fromAI('parameters1_Value', `Longitude of the location, e.g. 4.85 for Lyon. Do not ask the user just infer it automatically.`, 'string') }}

parameters.name: current
hourly
daily
end_date
parameters.value: ={{ /*n8n-auto-generated-fromAI-override*/ $fromAI('parameters6_Value', `End date in YYYY-MM-DD format. Must be after start_date. Example07-18`, 'string') }}

parameters.toolDescription: Gets the latest blog posts about any rss feed.
parameters.url:
={{ /*n8n-auto-generated-fromAI-override*/ $fromAI('URL', `Use one of:
- https://feeds.bbci.co.uk/news/world/rss.xml (BBC World – global headlines)
- https://www.aljazeera.com/xml/rss/all.xml (Al Jazeera English – in‑depth global coverage)
- http://rss.cnn.com/rss/edition_world.rss (CNN World – breaking news worldwide)
- https://techcrunch.com/feed/ (TechCrunch – global tech & startup news)
- http://news.ycombinator.com/rss (Hacker News – tech community headlines)
- https://n8n.io/blog/rss (n8n Blog – updates & tutorials)
- https://www.bonappetit.com/feed/recipes-rss-feed/rss (Bon Appétit – recent recipes list)
- https://www.endsreport.com/rss/news-and-analysis (ENDS Report – environmental law & policy news)
- https://medlineplus.gov/groupfeeds/new.xml (MedlinePlus – health topics & wellness updates)`, 'string') }}

parameters.content: These tools let the agent access real-world data or take actions.
This node helps the agent remember the last few messages to stay on topic.

The AI agent can:
1. **Receive** messages from the chat
2. **Select** the right tools (e.g., weather, news, email)
3. **Respond** with live, helpful answers


The **System Message** field adjusts the agent’s thinking, behavior, and replies.
